title: Strict domain types, storage validation & tests
tagline: Typed Entry/Guess, schema-validated localStorage, pure parsers/scoring with Vitest fixtures.
risk: Low–Medium — bad validation could drop good entries; preserve STORAGE_KEY and id format
headline: Both audits agree: loadEntries() blindly JSON.parses (app.js:25–31). Non-array JSON crashes on .map; bad guesses yield NaN points. WhatsApp dates are hard-coded DD/MM. Fix by extracting pure domain modules + schema validation + characterization tests before the UI rewrite.

decisions.q: Runtime schema library for storage/import boundaries
decisions.help: Only used at load/import edges. Zod is ubiquitous; Valibot is smaller. Hand-written guards avoid a dependency.
Must never crash the app. Dropping with a toast is safest; quarantine keeps data for export recovery.

options.label: Drop invalid rows + status toast count (recommended)
Move invalid rows to a quarantine key for later export
If any invalid, wipe all and start empty (harsh)

decisions.help: AU DD/MM is correct for the original author; US MM/DD mis-dates. Ambiguous 05/06 is the hard case.

options.label: Keep DD/MM only; warn on bulk preview if dates look odd
